known_limits: Portal availability and download formats need to be probed from live services.
Official geometry can still be stale or incomplete for current field conditions.
name: City of Flint GIS

known_limits: Some files require contacting the GIS Center instead of direct download.
Census attributes and geometries may have different vintages.
name: University of Michigan-Flint GIS Center Data

known_limits: Property data can imply household-level conditions and must be handled carefully.
Use as an origin story and comparison source before treating as a canonical feed.
name: Flint Property Portal

known_limits: Some map layers are older analytical products, not live operational feeds.
Download links may live on ArcGIS open-data subdomains.
name: MapFlint

known_limits: Crash location precision and export permissions need verification.
Annual official closed datasets may lag current conditions.
name: Michigan Traffic Crash Facts

known_limits: Tract estimates are modeled public health measures, not clinical records.
Uncertainty and measure definitions must be visible in the atlas.
name: CDC PLACES Census Tract Data 2025 Release

known_limits: TIGER/Line provides geography, while ACS provides estimates and margins of error.
ACS estimates require margin-of-error handling before comparison views.
name: U.S. Census ACS and TIGER/Line

known_limits: County parcel and ownership context may expose personal data and should not be mirrored casually.
Source terms and field-level privacy policy need review before public export.
name: Genesee County GIS
